subcodes.first_line: The Book which the All-Bountiful hath sent down on a Day wherein the tribes lamented, the earth was cleft asunder, and the mountains passed away unto those [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الوهاب فی یوم فیه ناحت القبائل و انشقت الارض و مرت الجبال الی الذین
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @martyrs and martyrdom, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @role and station of women, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @praise and encouragement, @contention and conflict, @oneness; unity of religion, @nationalism; love of country
